en.explanation: Li Zhi's account criticizes the false personality produced by orthodox pretension and supplies a criterion of literary authenticity. 'Childlike' means free of falsification, not immature or hostile to learning.

sources.locator: 《焚书》卷三〈童心说〉开篇

zh-CN.text: 天地与万物的生成可以在形与气的混合、分化过程中理解，而不必另设脱离形气的生成实体。
zh-CN.explanation: 该条只概括《呻吟语》明确的形气生成句，不把吕坤强行归为现代物质主义。

en.text: The generation of Heaven, Earth, and the myriad things can be understood through the mixing and differentiation of form and qi without positing a separate generative entity.
en.explanation: This claim follows Shenyin yu's explicit form-and-qi formulation without recasting Lü Kun as a modern materialist.

sources.locator: 《呻吟语·天地》“形气”条

zh-CN.text: 道必须落实在身体实践中；只在言说上求道会使知行分离，静中所得若不能贯通行动也不是真实成就。
zh-CN.explanation: 高攀龙把讲辨、静坐和日常操履统一起来，强调“诚为之”而非语言上的玄远。

en.text: The Way must be embodied in practice: seeking it in words separates knowing from action, and insight in stillness is incomplete if it does not carry into activity.
en.explanation: Gao Panlong joins discussion and quiet reflection to everyday conduct, stressing sincere enactment over verbal abstraction.

sources.locator: 《高子遗书》卷首陈龙正序引高子学旨段

zh-CN.text: 讲学不能脱离公共责任：内在养心要落实为善去恶，并通过书院讨论、官员谏诤和制度判断进入天下事务。
zh-CN.explanation: 《东林列传》同时保存顾宪成对“无善无恶”的批评和其东林讲学实践；本条是由传记材料支持的规范化概括。

en.text: Learning cannot be detached from public responsibility: cultivation must issue in doing good and removing evil and enter public affairs through academies, remonstrance, and institutional judgment.
en.explanation: Donglin liezhuan preserves both Gu's criticism of moral neutrality and his academy practice; the claim is a normalized synthesis supported by biography.

sources.locator: 《东林列传》卷二《顾宪成传》论学段

zh-CN.text: 道德工夫的根本在慎独：在念头尚未显著成为行为时察识意根，使心的隐微处不自欺。
zh-CN.explanation: 刘宗周把“独”理解为心体最隐微而又最真实的呈现处，由此批评只在已发行为上修补的工夫。

en.text: The root of moral cultivation is vigilance in solitude: discerning the root of intention before it becomes overt conduct so that the mind does not deceive itself in its subtlest activity.
en.explanation: Liu treats 'solitude' as the most subtle yet real disclosure of mind, criticizing cultivation that only repairs behavior after intentions have formed.

sources.locator: 《人谱》〈人极图说〉及〈证人要旨〉慎独条

zh-CN.text: 真一的真主超越空有、方所与形象，不是天地万物中的一个对象，却是万有存在与秩序的根源。
zh-CN.explanation: 王岱舆用“真一”区分造物主与作为宇宙开端的“数一”，借宋明理学术语表达伊斯兰认主独一。

en.text: The Real One transcends being and nonbeing, location, and form; it is not one object among the cosmos yet is the source of all existence and order.
en.explanation: Wang distinguishes the divine Real One from numerical one as the cosmic beginning, expressing Islamic divine unity through Neo-Confucian vocabulary.

sources.locator: 《正教真诠》上卷〈真一〉首段

zh-CN.text: 研究事物应实地考究其原因，从宏观周期到草木虫类，分类其性情、查验其趋避并推求常态与变化。
zh-CN.explanation: 方以智把这种可考核的研究称为“质测”；它与通几相配合，不能简单等同现代实验科学。

en.text: Inquiry into things should investigate their causes concretely, from large-scale cycles to plants and insects, classifying dispositions, testing tendencies, and tracing regularity and change.
en.explanation: Fang Yizhi calls this checkable inquiry zhice; it complements broader metaphysical integration and is not simply modern experimental science.

sources.locator: 《物理小识·自序》开篇界定质测段

zh-CN.text: 义理之学必须立足于经学、文字音韵和具体制度事实；脱离可考文献而空谈性命，会使思想失去检验。
zh-CN.explanation: 顾炎武不是取消义理，而是用经学方法重建其证据基础。

en.text: Learning about principle must be grounded in classics, philology, and concrete institutions; speculation on nature and destiny without examinable texts loses its checks.
en.explanation: Gu does not abolish normative inquiry; he reconstructs its evidential basis through classical scholarship.

sources.locator: 《亭林文集》卷三〈与友人论学书〉

zh-CN.text: 正当法律应从天下公共利益出发；一家一姓为维护私利而制定的制度只是君主之法，不是天下之法。
zh-CN.explanation: 《原法》批评的不是规则本身，而是将统治者私利冒充公共秩序。

en.text: Legitimate law should arise from the public interest of all-under-heaven; institutions made by one ruling house to protect private advantage are the ruler's law, not public law.
en.explanation: 'On Law' criticizes not rules as such but the conversion of dynastic private interest into purported public order.

sources.locator: 《明夷待访录·原法》首段

zh-CN.text: 天地的根本秩序保持连续，但具体气化每日更新；恒常与变化不是互相排斥的两个世界。
zh-CN.explanation: 王夫之以气化过程说明“日新”，反对把理理解成脱离变化的静态实体。

en.text: The basic order of Heaven and Earth is continuous while concrete transformations renew themselves daily; constancy and change are not separate worlds.
en.explanation: Wang explains daily renewal through transforming qi and rejects treating principle as a static entity outside change.

sources.locator: 《尚书引义》卷三〈太甲二〉

zh-CN.text: 道不能脱离具体的器而独立存在；没有具体事物与实践载体，就没有可实现的道。
zh-CN.explanation: 王夫之以“天下惟器”反对把道悬置于器物之外。道是具体存在、制度与实践中的条理，而不是另一个驱动世界的超验实体。

en.text: Dao cannot exist independently apart from concrete vessels; without concrete things and practical embodiments, there is no realizable dao.
en.explanation: With 'all under heaven consists only of vessels,' Wang Fuzhi rejects placing dao outside concrete things. Dao is the ordering within existents, institutions, and practices, not a separate transcendent entity that drives them.

sources.locator: 《周易外传》卷五，释《系辞上传》第十二章，第二节（中国哲学书电子化计划行174—176）

zh-CN.text: 天下及其公共利益应当是政治的主体，君主只是为天下履职的客体，统治的正当性取决于是否为天下谋利。
zh-CN.explanation: “天下为主，君为客”颠倒了以君主私利为中心的政治关系，把君职理解为公共责任；它不等同于现代民主制度，但对专制君权构成根本批判。

en.text: The realm and its common welfare should be the subject of politics; the ruler is only an officeholder serving it, and rule is legitimate insofar as it works for the realm's benefit.
en.explanation: 'The realm as host, ruler as guest' reverses ruler-centered politics and treats rulership as a public responsibility. It is not identical with modern democracy, but it is a fundamental critique of autocratic rulership.

sources.locator: 《明夷待访录·原君》第三段

zh-CN.text: 亡国只是政权易姓，亡天下则是仁义秩序与共同生活的毁坏；保天下因此是每个普通人的责任。
zh-CN.explanation: 顾炎武区分一姓政权与天下文明共同体，限制忠君义务并扩大道德政治责任的主体。

en.text: The fall of a state is dynastic replacement, whereas the loss of all-under-heaven destroys humane norms and common life; preserving the latter is therefore everyone's responsibility.
en.explanation: Gu distinguishes a ruling house from the civilizational common world, limiting dynastic loyalty and broadening responsibility to ordinary persons.

sources.locator: 《日知录》卷十三〈正始〉末段

zh-CN.text: 德性与知识在主动习行中养成；静坐和讲说若不转化为礼乐射御书数等实践，不能构成完整的学习。
zh-CN.explanation: 颜元批评宋儒“讲说多而践履少”，主张从幼年起习行六艺。

en.text: Virtue and knowledge are formed through active practice; quiet sitting and discourse without enactment in the Six Arts do not constitute complete learning.
en.explanation: Yan criticizes learning with much discourse but little enactment and advocates practicing the Six Arts from childhood.

sources.locator: 《存学编》卷一总论
《存学编》〈性理评〉首段

zh-CN.text: 认主独一是信仰的根本，顺从真主之命则把这一认识落实为伦理生活；知识与服从不可分离。
zh-CN.explanation: 马注把认主、顺命与人伦实践相连，借儒家“体用”语汇解释伊斯兰信仰和功修。

en.text: Recognizing the oneness of God is the root of faith, while obedience to divine command realizes that recognition in ethical life; knowledge and submission are inseparable.
en.explanation: Ma links recognition of God, obedience, and human relationships, using Confucian substance-function vocabulary to explain Islamic belief and practice.

sources.locator: 《清真指南》卷一〈认主〉开篇

zh-CN.text: 知识与德性必须通过身体力行才能成立；只在心口纸面上理解而未亲自习行，不能算真正学会。
zh-CN.explanation: 颜元以“习行”反对静坐空谈和书本主义，并据此改革教育内容，重视礼乐兵农等实学。

en.text: Knowledge and virtue become real only through embodied practice; understanding in thought, speech, or writing without personal enactment is not genuine learning.
en.explanation: Yan's 'practice and enactment' opposes quietistic verbalism and bookishness and supports education in rites, music, military and agricultural skills.

sources.locator: 《习斋记余》卷三〈答齐笃公秀才书〉

zh-CN.text: 自秦以后，帝制常以杀夺建立并以权势掩饰掠夺，因此皇帝称号不能使暴力统治自动获得道德正当性。
zh-CN.explanation: 唐甄的“皆贼”是对制度性权力来源的激烈道德批判，不是对每位君主私德作无差别传记判断。

en.text: Since Qin, imperial rule has often been founded on killing and seizure and concealed plunder through power; the imperial title does not automatically confer moral legitimacy on violent rule.
en.explanation: Tang Zhen's language of banditry is a moral critique of institutional origins of power, not an undifferentiated biography of every ruler.

sources.locator: 《潜书·室语》开篇

zh-CN.text: 圣贤之学以践履为学习本身，不以讲说和记诵替代行动；知只有在行中才得到完成。
zh-CN.explanation: 李塨继承颜元的习行论，把礼乐兵农的实际训练视为成德之学而非附属技能。

en.text: Sagely learning consists in enactment itself and does not substitute discourse or memorization for action; knowing is completed only in doing.
en.explanation: Following Yan Yuan, Li treats practical training in rites, music, military affairs, and agriculture as virtue-forming learning rather than auxiliary skill.

sources.locator: 《恕谷后集》卷二〈答门人问学〉

zh-CN.text: 真一是真主超越万有的本体，数一是受造世界秩序的开端；二者是本原与显用关系而绝非同一实体。
zh-CN.explanation: 刘智以真一/数一区分维护造物主与受造界的差别，同时用性理范畴解释宇宙层级。

en.text: The Real One is God's transcendent reality, while numerical one begins the created cosmic order; they relate as source and manifestation but are not the same entity.
en.explanation: Liu preserves the creator-created distinction through the Real One/numerical one distinction while using xingli categories to explain cosmic hierarchy.

sources.locator: 《天方性理》本经第一章“真一流出数一”图说

zh-CN.text: 血气与心知构成人性的一本连续体；道德学习不是用外在本体替换身体，而是使心知由昏昧进于明察。
zh-CN.explanation: 戴震用“一本”批评把心、性、血气割裂成不同本原的理论。

en.text: Vital embodiment and cognitive awareness form one continuous root of human nature; moral learning does not replace the body with an external essence but advances awareness from obscurity toward clarity.
en.explanation: Dai's one-root account criticizes theories that split mind, nature, and vital embodiment into different sources.

sources.locator: 《孟子字义疏证》卷上，论血气心知一本

zh-CN.text: 道不能脱离具体器物、制度与历史实践独立存在；研究道必须考察它在不同时代如何形成并发挥作用。
zh-CN.explanation: 这把“六经皆史”扩展为一种历史化的道器论。

en.text: The Way never exists apart from concrete instruments, institutions, and historical practice; inquiry into it must examine how it forms and functions in different times.
en.explanation: This extends 'the Six Classics are history' into a historicized account of Way and concrete forms.

sources.locator: 《文史通义·原道中》开篇

zh-CN.text: 理不是压制人情的外在命令，而是使自己与他人的情欲都得到无过无不及之实现的恰当准则。
zh-CN.explanation: 戴震把理落实在“情之不爽失”与以情絜情之中，以此批判借抽象天理剥夺他人正当欲求的做法；“情得”并不等于欲望毫无限制。

en.text: Li is not an external command that suppresses human feeling, but the fitting norm by which one's own and others' feelings and desires are fulfilled without excess or deficiency.
en.explanation: Dai grounds li in the unerring fulfillment of feeling and in measuring others' feelings by one's own, thereby criticizing appeals to abstract principle that deny legitimate human desires. Fulfillment does not mean wholly unrestrained desire.

sources.locator: 《孟子字义疏证》卷上〈理〉首节

zh-CN.text: 六经不是脱离历史的抽象义理汇编，而是古代圣王政教实践留下的制度与史迹，因此解释经典必须返回其历史生成。
zh-CN.explanation: “六经皆史”不是贬低经典，而是反对经史分裂，把道理解为随制度实践展开。

en.text: The Six Classics are not collections of ahistorical abstractions but institutional and historical traces of ancient sagely governance; interpreting them requires recovering their historical formation.
en.explanation: 'The Six Classics are all history' does not demote them; it rejects a classics-history split and understands the Way as unfolding through institutions and practice.

sources.locator: 《文史通义》内篇一〈易教上〉开篇

zh-CN.text: 制度、形势、惯例与风气都会随历史改变；改革能否发生，取决于是否有人依据见闻形成是非判断并将其公开表达或付诸实行。
zh-CN.explanation: 《上大学士书》以制度必变为前提，进而强调人才的见闻、判断与行动，而不是把任何旧例视作不可改变。

en.text: Institutions, circumstances, precedents, and public habits all change historically; reform depends on people who form judgments from evidence and either voice or implement them.
en.explanation: The letter begins from the historical mutability of institutions and then stresses informed judgment and action by capable persons rather than treating precedent as immutable.

sources.locator: 《龚自珍集》卷五《上大学士书》开篇

zh-CN.text: 性善不是人人已经完成的静态属性，而是人具有通过学习、扩充与实践趋向善的共同能力。
zh-CN.explanation: 焦循以训诂和全书互证解释孟子，把“能”与实际扩充区分，避免把性善理解为无需教育。

en.text: Goodness of nature is not a finished static property already possessed in full, but the shared human capacity to move toward goodness through learning, extension, and practice.
en.explanation: Through philology and cross-textual reading, Jiao distinguishes capacity from its actual extension and avoids making Mencian goodness dispense with education.

sources.locator: 《孟子正义》卷二十六，释“人皆有不忍人之心”及“能”字段

zh-CN.text: 仁不是封闭在个人内心的抽象实体，而是在两人相互关联、尽责相待的行为中显现。
zh-CN.explanation: 阮元从“仁”字古义和《论语》用例论证仁必见于人际实践，以此纠正把仁完全内在化的解释。

en.text: Ren is not an abstract entity enclosed within an individual mind; it appears in conduct between persons who stand in relation and fulfill responsibilities toward one another.
en.explanation: Ruan argues from ancient graph usage and Analects examples that ren must appear in interpersonal practice, correcting fully internalized readings.

sources.locator: 《揅经室集》一集卷八〈论语论仁论〉首段及结论段

zh-CN.text: 面对外来强权，应系统了解海外形势并学习其优势技术，把知识转化为交涉、防御与制衡能力。
zh-CN.explanation: “师夷长技以制夷”在原叙中与“以夷攻夷”“以夷款夷”并列，所指是以调查和学习恢复战略主动，而非无条件模仿。

en.text: In confronting foreign powers, one should systematically understand overseas conditions and learn their superior techniques, converting knowledge into capacities for negotiation, defense, and restraint.
en.explanation: In the preface, learning foreign strengths stands beside using foreign powers against one another and negotiating with them; the aim is strategic agency through inquiry, not unconditional imitation.

sources.locator: 《海国图志·原叙》首段，说明著书三旨处

zh-CN.text: 制度改革与西学吸收应以中国伦常名教为规范基础，同时采用各国能够实现富强的知识与技术。
zh-CN.explanation: 该方案不是拒绝西学，而是试图区分规范根基与可学习的制度技术；后来的“中体西用”不应完全倒投为其原词。

en.text: Institutional reform and the adoption of Western learning should retain Chinese ethical teaching as a normative foundation while using foreign knowledge and techniques that produce wealth and strength.
en.explanation: The proposal does not reject Western learning but distinguishes normative foundations from learnable institutions and techniques; the later formula 'Chinese essence, Western use' should not be projected back as his exact phrase.

sources.locator: 《校邠庐抗议·采西学议》结论段；中国作家网核录引文

zh-CN.text: 仁的首要意义是打破人我、上下、内外和中外的阻隔；这种‘通’以平等为其表现。
zh-CN.explanation: 《仁学》把仁重新解释为‘通’，并把平等、心力及社会政治变革组织在这一概念周围。

en.text: The primary meaning of ren is communication across barriers between self and others, ranks, inner and outer, and China and the world; equality is the form of such communication.
en.explanation: Renxue reconstructs ren as communication and organizes equality, mental force, and social-political transformation around that concept.

sources.locator: 《仁学·仁学界说二十七界说》第1、7条

zh-CN.text: 国家求强必须同时发展民众的体力与行动能力、开启其知识判断，并更新公共德性；三者不可只取其一。
zh-CN.explanation: 《原强》把强国要政归结为“鼓民力、开民智、新民德”三端，显示严复并不把富强简化为器物技术或单纯知识输入。

en.text: National strength requires developing the people's physical and practical capacity, opening their intelligence and judgment, and renewing public virtue together rather than pursuing only one.
en.explanation: On Strength reduces the principal tasks of national strengthening to invigorating popular capacity, opening intelligence, and renewing virtue, resisting a reduction of reform to technology or information alone.

sources.locator: 《原强》末段，“今日要政，统于三端”处

zh-CN.text: 大同秩序应超越彼此排他的国家边界，因为国家区隔持续制造私心、竞争与战争；世界公政府取代列国后，天下才可能趋于公。
zh-CN.explanation: 《大同书》乙部把“去国界”列为进入大同的制度步骤，并从邦国结构而非个别君主品德解释战争的持续。

en.text: The Great Unity should transcend mutually exclusive national boundaries because division into states perpetuates partiality, rivalry, and war; a common world government makes public-minded order possible.
en.explanation: Part B of the Book of Great Unity makes removal of national boundaries an institutional step toward Great Unity and explains recurring war through the state system rather than individual rulers' character.

sources.locator: 《大同书·乙部》“去国界合大地”条，第四项

zh-CN.text: 国家更新不能只靠制度移植，而必须以塑造具有公德、权利意识和自治能力的‘新民’为急务。
zh-CN.explanation: 《新民说》以国民品质和政治能力为国家更新的主体条件，其后各节分别讨论公德、权利、自由和自治。

en.text: National renewal cannot rest on institutional transplantation alone; it urgently requires forming new citizens with public virtue, a sense of rights, and capacities for self-government.
en.explanation: Xinmin Shuo treats civic character and political capacity as subjective conditions of national renewal, developing public virtue, rights, freedom, and self-government in later sections.

sources.locator: 《新民说》第二节‘论新民为今日中国第一急务’

zh-CN.text: 言论自由是公民社会形成的基础条件，也是民主与自由主义得以发展的制度前提。
zh-CN.explanation: 该命题记录严复系统译介西方政治思想时所主张的公共表达条件，不把其全部思想简化为单一自由主义立场。

en.text: Freedom of speech is a foundation of civil society and an institutional precondition for the development of democracy and liberalism.
en.explanation: This records Yan's advocacy of public expression while systematically translating Western political thought, without reducing his whole project to a single liberal position.

sources.locator: section 4.a ‘Yan Fu and Western Learning’, paragraph 2

zh-CN.text: 民权意味着主权属于民众，政治权力不能继续被少数人作为私人特权垄断。
zh-CN.explanation: 孙中山以民众主权反对君臣主义和专制，并把民权主义作为三民主义的政治原则。

en.text: Popular rights mean that sovereignty belongs to the people and political power cannot remain a private privilege monopolized by a few.
en.explanation: Sun Yat-sen opposes monarchic hierarchy and autocracy through popular sovereignty, making it the political principle of the Three Principles of the People.

sources.locator: 《三民主义》‘民权主义’开篇

zh-CN.text: 民众尚未普遍理解公理、旧俗尚存，并不是推迟革命的理由；政治竞争本身能够开启民智、彰明公理并清除妨碍共和的旧俗。
zh-CN.explanation: 章太炎反驳“民智未开故只能立宪”的论证，把革命理解为生成政治能力的过程，而非等待社会先被教育成熟后的结果。

en.text: Incomplete public understanding and persistent old customs are not reasons to postpone revolution; political struggle can itself awaken intelligence, clarify public principles, and remove customs obstructing republican change.
en.explanation: Zhang rejects the argument that an unenlightened populace permits only constitutional monarchy, treating revolution as a process that generates political capacity rather than an outcome that must await prior education.

sources.locator: 《驳康有为论革命书》中段，回应“公理未明、旧俗俱在”论证

zh-CN.text: 妇女受压迫不能仅归因于旧礼教，也必须与父权、资本主义劳动关系和帝国主义权力一并分析；因此解放不能缩减为少数女性获得职业或政治资格。
zh-CN.explanation: 哥伦比亚大学出版社对何殷震六篇论文的整理指出，她把性别压迫置于跨国的资本、劳动与权力关系中，这也是其无政府女性主义区别于同时代民族主义女权论的关键。

en.text: Women's subjugation cannot be attributed only to old customs but must be analyzed with patriarchy, capitalist labor relations, and imperial power; liberation exceeds elite access to careers or political rights.
en.explanation: Columbia University Press's edition of six essays shows He-Yin placing gender oppression within transnational relations of capital, labor, and power, distinguishing her anarchist feminism from nationalist feminist programs.

sources.locator: 出版社内容提要，第1—3段；目录所列何殷震六篇论文

zh-CN.text: 教育的目的在于养成完整人格；如果只灌输知识和训练技能而没有理想贯穿，就只是机械教育。
zh-CN.explanation: 蔡元培把人格养成置于知识和技能训练之上，并以世界观与人生观的调和说明教育理想。

en.text: Education should cultivate a whole personality; instruction in knowledge and skills without a guiding ideal is merely mechanical education.
en.explanation: Cai Yuanpei places personality formation above the transmission of knowledge and skills and explains educational ideals through harmony between world-view and life-view.

sources.locator: 《一九〇〇年以来教育之进步》‘教育之高尚理想’

zh-CN.text: 人文学术也应大胆提出假说，再以材料和考证谨慎检验，不能用经典权威替代可复核的研究程序。
zh-CN.explanation: 胡适把实验主义方法扩展到思想史、文学史与古籍辨伪；这里记录方法论主张而非认可其所有具体结论。

en.text: Humanistic inquiry should frame hypotheses boldly and test them carefully against evidence rather than substituting canonical authority for reproducible investigation.
en.explanation: Hu extended experimentalist method to intellectual and literary history and textual criticism; this records the method, not endorsement of every conclusion.

sources.locator: section 4.c ‘Hu Shi’, final paragraph

zh-CN.text: 梁漱溟把中国文化理解为以内向调和的生活态度追求人与自然、理性与情感的均衡。
zh-CN.explanation: 这是《东西文化及其哲学》的文化类型论概括；它属于梁氏的宏观比较框架，不等于对所有中国历史经验的事实描述。

en.text: Liang Shuming understood Chinese culture as pursuing harmony between humanity and nature, and reason and emotion, through an inward, moderate attitude toward life.
en.explanation: This summarizes the cultural typology of Eastern and Western Cultures and Their Philosophies; it is Liang's comparative framework, not a factual description of every Chinese historical experience.

sources.locator: section 3.c, paragraphs 3–4

zh-CN.text: 自然界可以依因果法则研究，但人的精神活动包含自由意志，不能无余地还原为同一种机械因果说明。
zh-CN.explanation: 张君劢以心物二分限制科学解释的范围；这是一种实在论唯心主义方案，而非否定自然科学。

en.text: Nature can be studied through causal laws, but human spiritual activity includes free will and cannot be exhaustively reduced to the same mechanical explanation.
en.explanation: Zhang limits scientific explanation through a mind-matter dualism; this is a realist-idealist program, not a wholesale rejection of natural science.

sources.locator: section 2, paragraphs 7–10

zh-CN.text: 民生原则把衣食住行置于政治的优先位置，并要求政府对关键公共事业和基本生活保障承担责任。
zh-CN.explanation: 该概括突出三民主义中的社会经济维度，不把民生主义简单等同于自由放任或国家全面垄断。

en.text: The livelihood principle gives political priority to food, clothing, housing, and transportation and assigns government responsibility for essential services and basic welfare.
en.explanation: The claim foregrounds the socioeconomic dimension of the Three Principles without equating livelihood either with laissez-faire or total state monopoly.

sources.locator: section 3.b, paragraph ending with the third Principle

zh-CN.text: 社会改革应从具体问题的调查和解决办法出发，而不能把抽象主义当成包治百病的答案。
zh-CN.explanation: 胡适并非否认一切理论，而是反对用抽象标签替代对具体社会条件和实际办法的研究。

en.text: Social reform should begin with investigating concrete problems and possible solutions rather than treating abstract isms as universal cures.
en.explanation: Hu Shi does not reject theory as such; he rejects substituting abstract labels for inquiry into concrete social conditions and practical remedies.

sources.locator: 《问题与主义》第一节

zh-CN.text: 熊十力区分把握根本真实的智与认识日常事物的慧；前者是无能所分裂的内在证会。
zh-CN.explanation: 该命题概括《新唯识论》以自证方式把握本心、并反对把根本真实客体化的立场。

en.text: Xiong Shili distinguished wisdom that grasps fundamental reality from discernment of ordinary things; the former is an inward realization without subject-object division.
en.explanation: This summarizes the New Treatise's account of realizing the true mind directly and its rejection of objectifying fundamental reality.

sources.locator: section 3, paragraphs 1–2

zh-CN.text: 根本真实不能被当作外在对象来概念化，只能在本心内部通过自证式体认而把握。
zh-CN.explanation: 该命题从知识方法上补充熊十力的智慧之分，并标示其反对象化立场。

en.text: Fundamental reality cannot be conceptualized as an external object; it is grasped only through inward, self-realizing awareness of the true mind.
en.explanation: This supplements Xiong's distinction between wisdom and discernment by identifying his anti-objectifying method.

sources.locator: section 3, paragraphs 4–6, citing Xiong 1932 [2015], pp. 25–26, 159

zh-CN.text: 面对外来与传统文化，既不能恐惧拒绝也不能全盘接受，而要主动占有、辨别，并决定使用、保存或淘汰。
zh-CN.explanation: “拿来主义”是一种文化判断方法：主体性来自有选择的转化，而不是闭关、被动输入或象征性送出。

en.text: In confronting foreign and inherited culture, one should neither reject it in fear nor accept it wholesale, but actively take possession, discriminate, and decide what to use, preserve, or discard.
en.explanation: 'Taking in' is a method of cultural judgment: agency arises through selective transformation rather than isolation, passive import, or symbolic export.

sources.locator: 《拿来主义》结尾“占有，挑选”与总结段

zh-CN.text: 唯物辩证法的辩证法、逻辑与认识论不是三套彼此分离的学科，而是同一哲学的相互贯通面向；认识过程必须在这种统一中说明。
zh-CN.explanation: Nick Knight对《社会学大纲》认识论章的分析以这一统一命题为开端；这里收录李达的体系结构判断，而不是泛泛贴上“马克思主义”标签。

en.text: Dialectics, logic, and epistemology within dialectical materialism are not three independent disciplines but interconnected aspects of one philosophy through which cognition must be explained.
en.explanation: Nick Knight begins his analysis of the epistemological portion of Elements of Sociology with this unity thesis; the claim records Li's systematic architecture rather than merely labeling him Marxist.

sources.locator: 章首内容提要，第1句

zh-CN.text: 六艺不是彼此孤立的知识门类，而是内在互释的义理整体；其分类、会通与解释共同构成理解经典和组织学术的循环。
zh-CN.explanation: 该命题依据《哲学研究》论文对马一浮六艺论的学术概括，突出其整体性与互释结构，不把论文作者措辞当作马一浮原句。

en.text: The Six Arts are not isolated disciplines but an internally interpreting whole of meaning; their classification, integration, and mutual explanation organize both classical understanding and learning.
en.explanation: This claim follows a Philosophical Research article's scholarly reconstruction of Ma's Six Arts theory, emphasizing holism and mutual interpretation without presenting the scholar's wording as Ma's own quotation.

sources.locator: 论文摘要，第3—4句，论“道—道术”层次与诠释学循环

zh-CN.text: 证据的标准、可知对象、感觉材料的选择与解释都受文化结构影响，而知识又必须借特定语言表达；认识因此始终经过文化与语言中介。
zh-CN.explanation: IEP把这一立场概括为“多元文化认识论”：差异不只发生在信念内容，也进入何以算作证据和充分理由的认识活动本身。

en.text: Standards of evidence, objects of inquiry, selection and interpretation of perception are culturally structured, while knowledge is expressed in particular languages; knowing is therefore always culturally mediated.
en.explanation: The IEP calls this pluralistic cultural epistemology: cultural difference affects not only belief content but the epistemic operations by which something counts as evidence or sufficient reason.

sources.locator: “Zhang Dongsun: Pluralistic Cultural Epistemology”第2—3段

zh-CN.text: 科学擅长以客观、分析和因果方法处理规律性对象，却不能由此决定人的人生观；自由意志、价值判断与自我选择需要不同于自然科学的哲学说明。
zh-CN.explanation: 张君劢并非否定科学，而是否定把自然科学方法扩张为唯一世界观；IEP将其1923年立场重构为科学对象与自由精神领域的区分。

en.text: Science handles regular objects through objective, analytic, and causal methods, but it cannot thereby determine an outlook on life; free will, value, and self-choice require philosophical treatment beyond natural science.
en.explanation: Zhang does not reject science; he rejects extending natural-scientific method into the sole worldview. The IEP reconstructs his 1923 position as a distinction between scientific objects and free spiritual life.

sources.locator: 第2节“The Debate of 1923 and Zhang's Moral Metaphysics”，第2—5段

zh-CN.text: 哲学是把人们关于整个世界的根本看法理论化的学问；它并非脱离日常生活的玄谈，而会通过世界观影响认识和行动。
zh-CN.explanation: 《大众哲学》把抽象哲学概念放回普通人的生活判断，强调人人事实上都有某种世界观，但世界观仍须接受理论批判与实践检验。

en.text: Philosophy theorizes people's fundamental view of the world as a whole; it is not speculation detached from ordinary life, because worldviews shape both cognition and action.
en.explanation: Popular Philosophy returns abstract concepts to ordinary judgment, stressing that everyone already has some worldview while insisting that worldviews remain subject to theoretical criticism and practical testing.

sources.locator: PDF第3—4页，讨论艾思奇《大众哲学》“哲学就是关于世界观的学问”定义段

zh-CN.text: 马克思主义哲学的唯物论、认识论和辩证法应以日常事例和通俗语言向非专业读者解释。
zh-CN.explanation: 《大众哲学》的哲学贡献也包含传播形式：它把专业概念转化为面向大众的日常论证。

en.text: Marxist materialism, epistemology, and dialectics should be explained to non-specialists through ordinary examples and accessible language.
en.explanation: Popular Philosophy's contribution includes its form of communication: translating technical concepts into everyday arguments for a broad readership.

sources.locator: publisher abstract, sentences 1–3

zh-CN.text: 分析具体过程必须区分主要矛盾与非主要矛盾、矛盾的主要方面与非主要方面，否则普遍法则会退化为空洞抽象。
zh-CN.explanation: 《矛盾论》把矛盾特殊性的分析作为从一般辩证法走向具体判断与行动的方法环节。

en.text: Analysis of a concrete process must distinguish principal from secondary contradictions and principal from secondary aspects, or universal law degenerates into empty abstraction.
en.explanation: On Contradiction makes analysis of particularity the methodological link between general dialectics and concrete judgment and action.

sources.locator: 《矛盾论》第四节‘主要的矛盾和主要的矛盾方面’末段

zh-CN.text: 冯友兰区分由理与体构成的真际和由气与用构成的实际，并认为前者在本体论上居先。
zh-CN.explanation: 这一区分构成新理学处理超越原则与现实世界关系的核心结构。

en.text: Feng Youlan distinguished the True Realm of principle and substance from the Real Realm of material force and function, holding the former to be ontologically prior.
en.explanation: This distinction is central to New Rationalist accounts of the relation between transcendent principle and the actual world.

sources.locator: Philosophy, paragraph 2; section 3, paragraph 1

zh-CN.text: 儒家思想若要继续存在，就不能被当作静止的古物，而应作为有机传统，在变迁中改造自身并回应新的精神需要与文化环境。
zh-CN.explanation: 贺麟的“新开展”不是原样复古，也不是全盘抛弃传统，而是要求以当代问题重新解释并系统化儒学。

en.text: For Confucian thought to remain alive, it cannot be treated as a static relic; it must operate as an organic tradition, transforming itself amid change and answering new spiritual needs and cultural environments.
en.explanation: He's ‘new development’ is neither unaltered restoration nor wholesale rejection, but a demand to reinterpret and systematize Confucianism through contemporary problems.

sources.locator: 《文化与人生》第一篇〈儒家思想的新开展〉开篇

zh-CN.text: 道由“式”与“能”不可分离的结合构成：只有式而无能便是空架，只有能而无式便不可成为现实；现实是能进入可能形式的历程。
zh-CN.explanation: 胡军的学术章节以“物质与形式、可能、现实与过程”等环节重构《论道》，显示金岳霖以逻辑分析建立过程形上学。

en.text: Dao consists in the inseparable conjunction of Form and Stuff: Form without Stuff is empty, while Stuff without Form cannot become actual; reality is Stuff entering possibilities.
en.explanation: Jun Hu reconstructs On Dao through matter and form, possibility, and reality and process, showing how Jin builds a process metaphysics through logical analysis.

sources.locator: 章内“Form and Stuff”及“Reality and Process”两节

zh-CN.text: 哲学以逻辑分析把握普遍之理；具体事物则是普遍原则在有形世界中的不完全实现。
zh-CN.explanation: 该命题补充新理学的研究方法，连接其理气结构与现代逻辑分析，而不把“理”当成时间上先出现的实体。

en.text: Philosophy grasps universal principle through logical analysis, while concrete things are imperfect realizations of universal principles in the formed world.
en.explanation: This adds the method of New Rationalism, linking its li-qi structure with logical analysis without treating li as temporally prior entities.

sources.locator: section 2.b, paragraphs 2–4

zh-CN.text: 认识是否具有真理性，最终必须回到社会实践并由实践结果加以检验。
zh-CN.explanation: 《实践论》把认识理解为从实践到认识、再回到实践的过程，并以社会实践作为检验真理的标准。

en.text: Whether cognition is true must ultimately be tested by returning it to social practice and examining its results.
en.explanation: On Practice treats cognition as a movement from practice to knowledge and back to practice, with social practice as the criterion of truth.

sources.locator: 《实践论》结论部分

zh-CN.text: 研究中国政治史应尊重中国文化的主体性，并从政府与被治理者双方考察制度责任；这不排斥现代或西方方法，所反对的是以外来理论取代对中国史实的准确理解。
zh-CN.explanation: 该论文摘要特别区分钱穆的文化主体性与拒绝西方方法：他的警告针对“奴隶式依赖”理论框架，而非比较或现代研究方法本身。

en.text: Chinese political history should respect cultural subjectivity and examine institutions from both rulers' and ruled perspectives; modern or Western methods remain usable when they do not displace historical accuracy.
en.explanation: The article explicitly distinguishes Qian's cultural subjectivity from rejection of Western methods: his warning targets slavish theoretical dependence, not comparison or modern research techniques themselves.

sources.locator: 论文摘要，第2—4句

zh-CN.text: 唐君毅主张文化活动的价值首先在于直接显现人的精神价值，而不能还原为工具或功利价值。
zh-CN.explanation: 这一立场把人的道德心与内在尊严置于文化评价的基础，并据此批评功利主义与自然主义。

en.text: Tang Junyi held that cultural activity is valuable chiefly because it directly manifests the value of the human spirit, not because of instrumental utility.
en.explanation: This position grounds cultural evaluation in moral mind and intrinsic human dignity, and motivates Tang's critique of utilitarianism and naturalism.

sources.locator: section 4, paragraphs 2–4

zh-CN.text: 宇宙不是封闭的机械物质系统，而是普遍生命不断流行、万物各自孕含生意并相互贯通的整体。
zh-CN.explanation: 方东美以“万物有生论”反对机械论，把存在、价值、生命和审美创造放在同一机体宇宙中理解。

en.text: The cosmos is not a closed mechanical-material system but an integrated field in which universal life continuously unfolds, every thing harbors vitality, and beings interpenetrate.
en.explanation: Fang's ‘pansophic vitalism’ opposes mechanism by understanding existence, value, life, and aesthetic creativity within one organismic cosmos.

sources.locator: 《中国人生哲学》1985年第6版，第114—115页；网页注xiv所引段落

zh-CN.text: 道德心不是外在科学观察推导出的对象，而是在恻隐、羞恶、辞让和是非等反应中直接体验到的身体性体认。
zh-CN.explanation: 徐复观保留价值实在论，却拒绝把这种体验建立在超越的双层自我形上学上。

en.text: Moral mind is not inferred from external scientific observation but directly experienced as embodied recognition in compassion, shame, deference, and moral judgment.
en.explanation: Xu retains realism about value while refusing to ground the experience in a metaphysics of a two-tier transcendent self.

sources.locator: sections 3.1 and 4.4, paragraphs 1–7

zh-CN.text: 庄子的“心斋”通过虚静和忘却功利欲望建立审美观照的主体；中国艺术精神不是外在形式清单，而是一种可由修养达到的自由心境。
zh-CN.explanation: 徐复观把庄子之道落实到人生主体，借“心斋”说明艺术何以能摆脱实用判断而产生对对象的纯粹观照与共感。

en.text: Zhuangzi's ‘fasting of the mind’ establishes the subject of aesthetic contemplation through emptiness, stillness, and release from utilitarian desire; the spirit of Chinese art is not a list of external forms but a free state of mind attainable through cultivation.
en.explanation: Xu locates Zhuangzi's Way in the lived subject, using fasting of the mind to explain how art suspends utilitarian judgment and enables contemplative perception and fellow-feeling with its object.

sources.locator: PDF第73—93页，〈第六节 心斋与知觉活动〉开篇及〈艺术精神的主体〉段

zh-CN.text: 牟宗三认为自由意志不能由理论知识证明，却能在现实的道德活动中被实践地体证。
zh-CN.explanation: 他借此改造康德问题：道德反应的现实性反过来确证自主意志，而非把自由仅保留为设准。

en.text: Mou Zongsan argued that free will cannot be proven by theoretical knowledge but can be practically realized and verified in moral activity.
en.explanation: He thereby reverses the Kantian problem: the reality of moral response confirms autonomous will rather than leaving freedom merely as a postulate.

sources.locator: section 3.3, paragraphs 3–8

zh-CN.text: 某些道德情感不是经验欲望造成的他律冲动，而是真我自我显现的理性或本体论情感。
zh-CN.explanation: 牟宗三借此改造康德的理性与倾向之分，但如何可靠地区分道德情感与经验欲望仍是其理论难题。

en.text: Some moral feelings are not heteronomous impulses caused by empirical desire but rational or ontological feelings through which the true self manifests itself.
en.explanation: Mou thereby revises Kant's reason-inclination distinction, though reliably distinguishing moral feeling from empirical desire remains a problem.

sources.locator: section 4.2, paragraphs 4–10

zh-CN.text: 心通过“感通”直接与他者和世界发生联系；认识主体与对象不是彼此封闭的实体，而在互动中相互显现。
zh-CN.explanation: 这里的“感”不只指情绪，而是相互作用和无阻隔的联系；该概念贯穿唐君毅的认识论与道德哲学。

en.text: Through affective connection, mind directly encounters others and the world; subject and object are not sealed entities but disclose themselves in interaction.
en.explanation: Here affect does not merely mean emotion but interaction and unobstructed connection; the concept links Tang's epistemology and ethics.

sources.locator: section 3.2, paragraphs 6–9

zh-CN.text: 哲学史研究不能只罗列材料或追踪外在影响，而应对材料施以理论照明，重构一位哲学家试图回答的基源问题及其基本设准。
zh-CN.explanation: 劳思光的“基源问题研究法”以理论还原统摄发生研究、系统研究和解析研究，目标是既呈现思想的内在动力，又接受史料约束。

en.text: The history of philosophy cannot merely list materials or trace external influences; it must illuminate materials theoretically by reconstructing the fundamental question a philosopher sought to answer and the basic postulates underlying that answer.
en.explanation: Lao's fundamental-question method uses theoretical reduction to coordinate genetic, systematic, and analytic approaches, aiming to display thought's inner motivation while remaining constrained by historical evidence.

sources.locator: PDF第74—76页“基源研究法”讨论，转引《新编中国哲学史》卷一第14—15页

zh-CN.text: 马克思主义应从现实的、社会的、实践的人出发，而不能把人缩减为抽象意识、孤立生物或单一阶级标签；制度与生产必须把劳动者当作目的和完整的人。
zh-CN.explanation: 王若水借青年马克思、历史唯物主义和异化理论，批评哲学教科书忽略人的价值，并把人道主义问题带回社会主义现实。

en.text: Marxism should begin from real, social, practical human beings rather than reducing persons to abstract consciousness, isolated biology, or a single class label; institutions and production must treat workers as ends and as whole persons.
en.explanation: Drawing on the young Marx, historical materialism, and alienation, Wang criticizes philosophical textbooks for neglecting human value and returns humanism to the analysis of socialist reality.

sources.locator: “从抽象王国到现实的人的世界”第76—81段及“要把劳动者看作人”第83—90段

zh-CN.text: 异化并非只属于资本主义；社会主义社会也必须检视制度和权力是否使人的活动及其成果反过来支配人。
zh-CN.explanation: 王若水以马克思早期异化理论和人道主义批评社会主义内部问题；这在1980年代形成重要哲学论争。

en.text: Alienation is not confined to capitalism; socialist society must also examine whether institutions and power make human activity and its products dominate people.
en.explanation: Wang used Marx's early theory of alienation and humanism to criticize problems within socialism, generating a major 1980s philosophical controversy.

sources.locator: journal landing-page abstract and editorial introduction

zh-CN.text: 主体性首先形成于人类群体改造世界的生产实践，并通过历史积淀进入个体的心理结构，而不是孤立个人的任意选择。
zh-CN.explanation: 李泽厚以“主体性”区别于存在主义式个体选择，把工具使用、社会实践与文化心理积淀连接起来；审美能力也是这一历史塑形的结果。

en.text: Subjectality is formed first through humanity’s collective productive practice and historically sedimented into individual psychologies, rather than consisting in an isolated individual’s arbitrary choice.
en.explanation: Li distinguishes subjectality from existentialist individual choice by connecting tool use, social practice, and cultural-psychological sedimentation; aesthetic capacities are products of this historical formation as well.

sources.locator: Philosophy East and West 49.2 (1999), pp. 176–180；并参〈关于主体性的补充说明〉（1985）第15页

zh-CN.text: “兼和”是在包容差异的同时取得动态平衡；真正的和谐不是消灭多样性的“同”，而是让众异共存并持续更新。
zh-CN.explanation: 张岱年以“兼和”修正容易停滞的中庸理解，把中国传统的和同之辨同辩证法、多元主义和文化创新连接起来。

en.text: ‘Inclusive harmony’ achieves dynamic balance while encompassing difference; genuine harmony is not sameness that erases plurality but the coexistence and continuing renewal of diverse elements.
en.explanation: Zhang uses inclusive harmony to correct static readings of the mean, connecting the Chinese distinction between harmony and sameness with dialectics, pluralism, and cultural innovation.

sources.locator: 《张岱年全集》第6卷第225页“兼和”定义；第8卷第602页〈八十自述〉

zh-CN.text: 认识论不应止于事实知识，还要说明知识如何转化为关于人生、价值和自由人格的智慧。
zh-CN.explanation: 冯契以广义认识论组织“知识—智慧”问题，试图贯通科学认识、价值选择与人格培养。

en.text: Epistemology should not stop at factual knowledge but explain how knowledge becomes wisdom concerning life, value, and free personality.
en.explanation: Feng Qi organizes the knowledge-wisdom problem through a broad epistemology linking science, value choice, and formation of personality.

sources.locator: abstract, sentences 1–4

zh-CN.text: 中国现代哲学不能在复古与全盘西化之间二选一，而应以分析和批判形成兼收中国传统、马克思主义与西方哲学成果的创造综合。
zh-CN.explanation: “综合创新”不是把不同传统机械拼接，而是经由相容性辨析、批判和重构产生新体系。

en.text: Modern Chinese philosophy need not choose between restoration and wholesale Westernization; critical analysis can create a synthesis of Chinese, Marxist, and Western resources.
en.explanation: Creative synthesis is not mechanical juxtaposition but a new system produced through compatibility analysis, critique, and reconstruction.

sources.locator: chapter 12, title and overview

zh-CN.text: 审美心理不是脱离历史的先验结构，而是社会实践、礼乐传统与情感形式长期积淀到身体和心理中的结果。
zh-CN.explanation: 积淀说把马克思式实践、康德美学问题与中国礼乐经验连接起来；该命题不把“积淀”误解为静态遗传。

en.text: Aesthetic psychology is not an ahistorical a priori structure but the sedimented result of social practice, ritual-musical traditions, and affective forms in body and mind.
en.explanation: Sedimentation links Marxian practice, Kantian aesthetic questions, and Chinese ritual-musical experience; it should not be mistaken for static inheritance.

sources.locator: chapter 13, pp. 313–334, title and chapter framing

zh-CN.text: 理论只有被转化为解决问题的方法，并进一步内化为人的德性和思想觉悟，才真正实现理论联系实际；继承理论意味着通过它并超过它。
zh-CN.explanation: 冯契的“两化”把知识论、方法论与价值论连接起来，反对把理论当成只需重复的结论。

en.text: Theory genuinely joins practice only when transformed into a method for solving problems and further internalized as virtue and reflective awareness; inheriting theory means passing through it and going beyond it.
en.explanation: Feng's two transformations connect epistemology, methodology, and value theory, opposing the treatment of theory as conclusions to be merely repeated.

sources.locator: 〈智慧的探索——《智慧说三篇》导论〉开篇回顾“两化”命题及结尾“通过它并且超过它”段

zh-CN.text: 世界上没有完全相同的事物，但不同者能够相通；哲学的最高任务不应停在寻找抽象同一性，而应体验差异者在宇宙整体中的相互贯通。
zh-CN.explanation: 张世英以“相通”取代把差异抹平的“相同”，既维护个体独特性，也为语言交流、历史连续性和万物一体提供解释。

en.text: Nothing in the world is completely identical, yet different things can interconnect; philosophy's highest task should not stop at abstract identity but should experience how differences communicate within the cosmic whole.
en.explanation: Zhang substitutes interconnection for identity that erases difference, preserving individuality while explaining linguistic communication, historical continuity, and the unity of things.

sources.locator: 《北京大学学报》1995年第4期，第53—59页；网页摘要全文

zh-CN.text: 诠释不是与存在分离的文本技术；理解在本体、知识与道德实践的循环中生成，并反过来转化理解者。
zh-CN.explanation: 成中英以《易》的生成变化和本体—方法循环扩展西方诠释学，使理解同时具有认识论、本体论和德性修养意义。

en.text: Interpretation is not a textual technique separate from being; understanding emerges through a circulation of ontology, knowledge, and moral practice and in turn transforms the interpreter.
en.explanation: Cheng extends Western hermeneutics through Yijing-based generation and a circulation between ontology and method, giving understanding epistemic, ontological, and self-cultivational force.

sources.locator: Journal of Chinese Philosophy 27.1 (2000), pp. 33–38, 61–68

zh-CN.text: 儒家人文主义应是“人—宇宙共同体”的：人嵌入天地万物的秩序并承担回应责任，而不是以人类中心主义支配自然。
zh-CN.explanation: 杜维明以天地人合一重构现代人文主义，把人的尊严与生态责任同时奠基于关系性的宇宙位置。

en.text: Confucian humanism should be anthropocosmic: humans are embedded in the order of Heaven, Earth, and the myriad things and bear responsive responsibility rather than dominating nature anthropocentrically.
en.explanation: Tu reconstructs modern humanism through the unity of Heaven, Earth, and humanity, grounding human dignity and ecological responsibility in a relational cosmic position.

zh-CN.text: 去政治化把市场、国家和社会不平等呈现为自然、中立或纯技术过程，从而抹去利益冲突与公众介入政治的空间。
zh-CN.explanation: 汪晖所说的重新政治化，不等于增加权力斗争，而是揭示被自然化的支配关系并恢复理论争论与自主社会行动。

en.text: Depoliticization presents markets, the state, and social inequality as natural, neutral, or merely technical processes, thereby erasing conflicts of interest and spaces for public intervention.
en.explanation: For Wang, repoliticization does not mean more power struggle; it denaturalizes domination and restores theoretical debate and autonomous social action.

sources.locator: New Left Review II/41 (2006), pp. 39–45, especially “State and ideology”

zh-CN.text: 全球问题必须以世界整体而非国家间外部关系为基本政治单位，通过可被所有人接受的世界制度转化为真正的“世界内部问题”。
zh-CN.explanation: 赵汀阳重构“天下”为新普遍主义，批评只处理国家利益均衡的国际政治；节点不预设其制度方案已经解决权力不对称。

en.text: Global problems require the world as the basic political unit rather than external relations among states, with a universally acceptable world institution turning them into genuinely internal world problems.
en.explanation: Zhao reconstructs tianxia as neo-universalism and criticizes international politics limited to balancing state interests; the node does not assume his institution already resolves power asymmetry.

sources.locator: Diogenes 56.1 (2009), abstract, pp. 5–6

zh-CN.text: 具体形上学不能把存在抽象为脱离人的空洞本体；它要在事实与价值、知识与意义、成己与成物的统一过程中把握真实存在。
zh-CN.explanation: 杨国荣试图在反传统形上学批判之后保留形上追问，同时用人的历史实践限制空洞思辨。

en.text: Concrete metaphysics cannot abstract being into an empty ground detached from human life; it approaches authentic being through the unity of fact and value, knowledge and meaning, and self- and world-formation.
en.explanation: Yang seeks to preserve metaphysical inquiry after critiques of traditional metaphysics while constraining empty speculation through historically situated human practice.

sources.locator: Philosophical Horizons, chap. 1 “Metaphysics and the Metaphysical,” pp. 1–22; chap. 7, pp. 183–210

zh-CN.text: 阴阳不是两个固定且互斥的实体，而是包含相依、互含、交感、互补和转化的关系范式，其互动具有生成新事物的效力。
zh-CN.explanation: Robin Wang将阴阳从简单的二元对立中解放出来，同时指出历史文本中的性别关联不能自动被当作永恒自然等级。

en.text: Yinyang is not a pair of fixed mutually exclusive substances but a relational paradigm of interdependence, mutual inclusion, resonance, complementarity, and transformation whose interaction is generative.
en.explanation: Robin Wang frees yinyang from simple binary opposition while showing that historical gender correlations should not automatically be treated as eternal natural hierarchy.

sources.locator: Yinyang, Introduction, pp. 6–12; chap. 2, pp. 41–82

zh-CN.text: 政治权力的正当性不能只来自民意，还必须同时得到超越性道德原则、历史文化连续性和人民认可三方面支持。
zh-CN.explanation: 蒋庆把三方面分别表述为天、地、人之合法性，并据此提出制度构想；节点只记录正当性论证，不把方案评价为已经可行。

en.text: Political legitimacy cannot derive from popular will alone; it must also be supported by transcendent moral principle, historical-cultural continuity, and popular acceptance.
en.explanation: Jiang names these the legitimacy of Heaven, Earth, and the human and builds an institutional proposal upon them; the node records the legitimacy argument without judging the proposal feasible.

sources.locator: A Confucian Constitutional Order, chap. 1, section “Threefold Legitimacy”

zh-CN.text: 中华传统价值的突出取向是责任、义务、社群与和谐分别优先于自由、权利、个人与冲突。
zh-CN.explanation: 陈来把这些表述定义为文明的比较性“价值偏好”，不是声称自由、权利或个人毫无价值；公开节点必须保留这一限定。

en.text: A salient orientation of traditional Chinese values gives priority to responsibility, duty, community, and harmony over freedom, rights, the individual, and conflict respectively.
en.explanation: Chen presents these formulations as comparative civilizational preferences, not as claims that freedom, rights, or individuals have no value; the qualification must remain explicit.

sources.locator: 《中华文明的核心价值》导论；清华大学机构页首段

zh-CN.text: 儒家伦理既不能简化为利己主义，也不能简化为牺牲自我的利他主义；成德意味着把他人的福祉纳入与自己同体的关切。
zh-CN.explanation: 黄勇认为成德以成就自己为目标，却又必然关心他人；“与人同体”使自利/利他的现代二分不再充分。

en.text: Confucian ethics is reducible neither to egoism nor to self-sacrificial altruism; becoming virtuous incorporates others’ well-being into concern for a shared body.
en.explanation: Huang argues that self-cultivation aims at one’s own virtue yet necessarily concerns others; becoming one body with others makes the modern egoism/altruism dichotomy inadequate.

sources.locator: Frontiers of Philosophy in China 13.2 (2018), abstract and pp. 226–230

zh-CN.text: 较好的政体可以结合民主问责与机会平等、儒家贤能政治以及准自由主义的法律和权利保障，而不把政治平等视为唯一最高原则。
zh-CN.explanation: 白彤东的混合政体论试图保留民主、自由与贤能政治各自的部分优势；节点记录其规范方案，不声称经验上已被证明。

en.text: A preferable regime can combine democratic accountability and equal opportunity, Confucian meritocratic elements, and quasi-liberal protections of law and rights without treating political equality as the sole highest principle.
en.explanation: Bai’s hybrid-regime argument seeks to retain selected advantages of democracy, liberty, and meritocracy; the node records a normative proposal, not an empirically proven result.

sources.locator: Against Political Equality, book abstract and chap. 3 “A Confucian Hybrid Regime”

zh-CN.text: 和谐不是消除差异后的同一，而是不同要素通过相互调整、配合与转化生成新整体的动态过程。
zh-CN.explanation: 李晨阳把动态和谐从宇宙生成延伸到人格、社会和人与自然关系，并明确区分和谐与顺从或压制冲突。

en.text: Harmony is not sameness produced by eliminating difference but a dynamic process in which different elements generate new wholes through mutual adjustment, accommodation, collaboration, and transformation.
en.explanation: Li extends dynamic harmony from cosmogony to persons, society, and human-nature relations, explicitly distinguishing harmony from conformity or suppressed conflict.

sources.locator: Reshaping Confucianism, chap. 1, pp. 27–52; Oxford Academic abstract

notes.zh-CN: 列子与马一浮的两条已取证观点都涉及“天道与形上”：前者强调“生成与变化不是偶发事件，而是万物无时不在进行的持续过程。”，后者强调“六艺不是彼此孤立的知识门类，而是内在互释的义理整体；其分类、会通与解释共同构成理解经典和组织学术的循环。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Liezi and Ma Yifu both address Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics: the former emphasizes “Generation and transformation are not occasional events b…”, the latter “The Six Arts are not isolated disciplines but an internal…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 慧远与白彤东的两条已取证观点都涉及“政治与治理、伦理与修养”：前者强调“出家者以超越生死和世俗秩序为志，属于“方外之宾”；因此可以不履行臣民向君王跪拜的同一礼制，同时仍以教化和德行利益社…”，后者强调“较好的政体可以结合民主问责与机会平等、儒家贤能政治以及准自由主义的法律和权利保障，而不把政治平等视为唯一最高原则。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Huiyuan and Bai Tongdong both address Politics & governance, Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “Renunciants seek transcendence of life-and-death and worl…”, the latter “A preferable regime can combine democratic accountability…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 孙膑与阮籍的两条已取证观点都涉及“伦理与修养、政治与治理”：前者强调“战争关系国家存亡，必须审慎考察；好战会亡国，把取胜当作私利也会受辱，因此只能准备充分后行动。”，后者强调“最高的人格不以世俗名分、功名和礼法束缚自身，而与天地同体、随自然变化，在不役于外物中获得自由。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Sun Bin and Ruan Ji both address Ethics & self-cultivation, Politics & governance: the former emphasizes “Because warfare bears on a state's survival, it must be e…”, the latter “The highest person is not confined by conventional ranks,…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 杜顺与王岱舆的两条已取证观点都涉及“宗教与超越、天道与形上”：前者强调“色并非先存在而后被消灭为空；色当体无自性，所以即空，而真空也只能在不碍色相显现中被理解。”，后者强调“真一的真主超越空有、方所与形象，不是天地万物中的一个对象，却是万有存在与秩序的根源。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Dushun and Wang Daiyu both address Religion & transcendence, Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics: the former emphasizes “Form is not first existent and later annihilated into emp…”, the latter “The Real One transcends being and nonbeing, location, and…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 周公与郑玄的两条已取证观点都涉及“礼法与制度、伦理与修养”：前者强调“《康诰》的传统传承把周公塑造成以文王“明德慎罚”为治理准则的训诫者：彰明德政，同时谨慎使用刑罚并照顾鳏寡。”，后者强调“礼如同人的身体结构：只有各项礼节相互配合而完备，人才能成为伦理意义上完整的人。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Duke of Zhou and Zheng Xuan both address Ritual, law & institutions, Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “The transmitted Kang Gao depicts the Duke of Zhou as an a…”, the latter “Ritual is analogous to the structure of a body: only when…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 孙子与僧肇的两条已取证观点都涉及“知识与方法”：前者强调“善战者先创造足以取胜的条件，然后才寻求交战；失败者则先开战，再企求在战斗中侥幸取胜。”，后者强调“缘起之物并非实有，因为它没有独立自性；但它也不是断灭的虚无，因为现象依缘显现。因此真空必须同时超越“实有”和“绝无…”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Sunzi and Sengzhao both address Knowledge & method: the former emphasizes “The skillful force first creates conditions sufficient fo…”, the latter “Dependently arisen things are not truly existent because …”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 王符与康有为的两条已取证观点都涉及“社会与天下、政治与治理”：前者强调“国家以人民为根本，人民以粮食维持生命；政务若不断侵夺农时，便会同时摧毁民生与国家的根基。”，后者强调“大同秩序应超越彼此排他的国家边界，因为国家区隔持续制造私心、竞争与战争；世界公政府取代列国后，天下才可能趋于公。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Wang Fu and Kang Youwei both address Society & world order, Politics & governance: the former emphasizes “A state is grounded in its people, and the people's lives…”, the latter “The Great Unity should transcend mutually exclusive natio…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 子思与张栻的两条已取证观点都涉及“伦理与修养”：前者强调“诚是真实无妄的天道，而努力使自身达到诚则是人的道路。”，后者强调“义是本心认为应当做而自然不能停止的事；若因外在收益才行动，就已经落入私利。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Zisi and Zhang Shi both address Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “Sincerity is Heaven's way of undeceived reality, while br…”, the latter “Righteousness is what the original mind recognizes as fit…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 叶适与王蓉蓉的两条已取证观点都涉及“天道与形上、自然与技艺”：前者强调“道虽本于一，却只能在阴阳、刚柔、逆顺等相待的两端中具体实现；执着一端便不能理解变化。”，后者强调“阴阳不是两个固定且互斥的实体，而是包含相依、互含、交感、互补和转化的关系范式，其互动具有生成新事物的效力。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Ye Shi and Robin R. Wang both address Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics, Nature, science & technology: the former emphasizes “Although the Way originates in unity, it is concretely re…”, the latter “Yinyang is not a pair of fixed mutually exclusive substan…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 李斯与何震的两条已取证观点都涉及“社会与天下、政治与治理”：前者强调“王者的强大来自接纳不同地域的人民与人才；排斥外来者会削弱本国并资助敌国。”，后者强调“妇女受压迫不能仅归因于旧礼教，也必须与父权、资本主义劳动关系和帝国主义权力一并分析；因此解放不能缩减为少数女性获得…”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Li Si and He Zhen both address Society & world order, Politics & governance: the former emphasizes “A ruler's strength comes from admitting people and talent…”, the latter “Women's subjugation cannot be attributed only to old cust…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 公孙龙与玄奘的两条已取证观点都涉及“名辩与语言”：前者强调““白马”与“马”具有不同的名义条件：求马不限定颜色，求白马则限定白色，因此白马不能与马这一名称所指完全等同。”，后者强调“在胜义分析中，共同承认的可见色境不离眼识；这不是否认经验现象，而是反驳色境作为心外独立实体的成立。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Gongsun Long and Xuanzang both address Names, logic & language: the former emphasizes “'White horse' and 'horse' impose different nominal condit…”, the latter “Under ultimate analysis, commonly accepted visible form i…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 周文王与何晏的两条已取证观点都涉及“天道与形上”：前者强调“在把《周易》卦辞传统归于周文王的作者谱系中，乾卦以“元亨，利贞”断定大通，并强调守持正固才有利。”，后者强调“一切“有”之所以能够成立，依恃的是“无”；一切具体事务之所以能够成就，也以无形无名的道为根据。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by King Wen of Zhou and He Yan both address Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics: the former emphasizes “Within the authorial tradition that assigns the Zhouyi he…”, the latter “Whatever counts as being depends on nonbeing for its aris…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 吉藏与杨国荣的两条已取证观点都涉及“天道与形上、知识与方法”：前者强调“真谛与俗谛首先是佛陀因应众生而使用的两种言教，不是两个固定存在的境界；执著任何一谛为实体都会失去二谛的破执功能。”，后者强调“具体形上学不能把存在抽象为脱离人的空洞本体；它要在事实与价值、知识与意义、成己与成物的统一过程中把握真实存在。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Jizang and Yang Guorong both address Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics, Knowledge & method: the former emphasizes “The ultimate and conventional truths are first of all two…”, the latter “Concrete metaphysics cannot abstract being into an empty …”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 郭象与胡宏的两条已取证观点都涉及“天道与形上、伦理与修养”：前者强调“真正的逍遥不是取消差异和条件，而是每一事物安于自身性分、适合其所依条件，因而都能在各自尺度上自得。”，后者强调“性是天地与鬼神所以成立和变化的深层根据，不能简单用经验层面的善恶二分穷尽。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Guo Xiang and Hu Hong both address Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics, Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “Genuine freedom does not abolish differences and conditio…”, the latter “Human-cosmic nature is the deep ground through which heav…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 马祖道一与刘宗周的两条已取证观点都涉及“心性与人性、伦理与修养”：前者强调“众人应信自己的心就是佛心，不必向心外寻找佛；但“即心是佛”是引导觉悟的方便，不应再把日常分别心实体化为佛。”，后者强调“道德工夫的根本在慎独：在念头尚未显著成为行为时察识意根，使心的隐微处不自欺。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Mazu Daoyi and Liu Zongzhou both address Mind & human nature, Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “People should trust that their own mind is Buddha-mind an…”, the latter “The root of moral cultivation is vigilance in solitude: d…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 扬雄与临济义玄的两条已取证观点都涉及“心性与人性、伦理与修养”：前者强调“人性混合着善与恶的倾向；修养善的倾向会成为善人，发展恶的倾向则会成为恶人。”，后者强调“修行者若不被外境和既成名相夺走判断，就能在任何处境中作主；真实性不在别处，而在当下不受境转的立足处显现。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Yang Xiong and Linji Yixuan both address Mind & human nature, Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “Human nature mixes tendencies toward good and bad; cultiv…”, the latter “When practitioners do not let circumstances or inherited …”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 邵雍与方东美的两条已取证观点都涉及“天道与形上、自然与技艺”：前者强调“天地的生成与作用可由动静、阴阳、刚柔等成对范畴的交互得到系统说明。”，后者强调“宇宙不是封闭的机械物质系统，而是普遍生命不断流行、万物各自孕含生意并相互贯通的整体。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Shao Yong and Thomé H. Fang both address Heaven, cosmos & metaphysics, Nature, science & technology: the former emphasizes “The generation and operation of heaven and earth can be s…”, the latter “The cosmos is not a closed mechanical-material system but…”. This marks cross-period conceptual similarity only, not historical influence.

notes.zh-CN: 苏轼与梁漱溟的两条已取证观点都涉及“伦理与修养”：前者强调“求道不能只靠书面解释；缺少亲身实践的人，即使得到正确言说，也无法形成真正理解。”，后者强调“梁漱溟把中国文化理解为以内向调和的生活态度追求人与自然、理性与情感的均衡。”。此线只表示跨时期主题相似，不主张历史影响。
notes.en: The evidenced claims by Su Shi and Liang Shuming both address Ethics & self-cultivation: the former emphasizes “The Way cannot be learned through verbal explanation alon…”, the latter “Liang Shuming understood Chinese culture as pursuing harm…”.
